title: Morning tech and coffee
description: Hi neighbors! Let’s gather together, share ideas, and talk tech. Since a lot of us are in permanent WFH mode, we thought it would be nice to have a reason to leave our apartments in the morning and interact with real live friendly faces in our neighborhood. This is a host-free event with no specific […]

title: Korean for Beginners I
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Do you want to watch Korean dramas and movies without English captions? Do you want to say hello to your Korean neighbors or read signs in Korean? Or perhaps you dream of ordering Korean food in Korean? Then, this class is for you. You will be learning Korean words starting at the first class! Registration […]

title: Art Class (Adults)
description: The Jackson Heights Art Club offers several weekly adult classes in watercolor, oil, acrylic, pastel and drawing. Each student receives individual guidance and assistance from our professional instructors at the Club’s Studio. One may register or learn more about the classes by calling (718) 426-9821, and the club’s website is jacksonheightsartclub.org.

title: Easy Chair Yoga for All! (English and Spanish)
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Yoga suave en silla para todos (en inglés y español) English: Chair yoga is a gentle way to achieve flexibility and relaxation as well as learn breathing techniques, practice meditation and improve health. Join our yoga instructor Paola M. Cardenas as we explore the benefits of this ancient method of exercise and relaxation. Spanish: Yoga […]

title: Hula Lessons with Verona
description: Hula Hooping & jump roping with Verona. Free and open to all. Sponsored by the 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition.

title: Intergenerational Thursdays
description: Intergenerational arts, crafts and games with Yoni on 34 Ave & 89 St. A collaboration between @selfhelpcommunityservices & the @34_ave OS Coalition.

title: ESL Conversation Club – For Beginners
description: Come practice English with us! Ven a practicar inglés con nosotros. Es gratis y para todos los niveles. Sponsored by the 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition.

title: Community Class: Flexibility + Focus, Yoga For Teens (bilingual Spanish + English)
description: Community Class with Jennifer Alarcon on Thursdays. This bilingual Spanish/English class is for all students age 11-15. No experience required! Email [email protected] for details.

title: Sunnyside Community Cultural Initiative
address: Bliss St, 46th St, Sunnyside, NY 11104, USA
description: Sunnyside Community Cultural Initiative is back! Enjoy live music at the plazas every Thursday starting April till September from local talent!

title: “Shine The Light” Weekly Visibility Action
description: Shine the Light with Jackson Heights Indivisible & The Beacon Jackson Heights Indivisible is proud to join The Beacon’s growing national movement of people of all faiths and backgrounds taking a stand against injustice through visible acts of solidarity. Every Thursday we gather in Jackson Heights for 30 minutes to shine a light for justice, […]

title: Immerse Yourself in Korean Culture featuring the Korean Traditional Music and Dance Center
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: 뉴욕한국국악원과 함께하는 한국 문화 체험 English: A captivating cultural experience for all ages! Don’t miss this special opportunity to experience the beauty and energy of Korean traditional performing arts. Join the Korean Traditional Music and Dance Center for an unforgettable showcase of elegant Korean traditional dance and exhilarating live percussion. Immerse yourself in rich rhythms, […]

title: Jackson Heights Science Fiction Book Club
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Join the Jackson Heights Science Fiction Book Club! Sci-fi enthusiasts and newcomers to the genre are welcome for a lively discussion as we read books from across the science/speculative fiction genre. Please call the Jackson Heights Library for the book of the month. A limited number of copies will be available at the reference desk […]

title: Weekly ¡DALE! Runs
address: 86-13 Northern Blvd, Jackson Heights, NY 11372, USA
description: Join the crew, feel the vibes & connect with our community. Shoutout to our running community for making Queens Beer Factory your weekly stop, where the miles end and the good times begin. From the run to the bar, this is your home.

title: Subcampeon
description: Exfutbolista ZUHAITZ GURRUTXAGA en – in STAND-UP COMEDY SHOW EN ESPAÑOL En celebración de la COPA MUNDIAL DE FÚTBOL 2026 ZUHAITZ GURRUTXAGA (1980), EXFUTBOLISTA profesional, fue campeón de Europa sub-16 y medalla de bronce Mundial sub-17 con la selección española. Años después se proclamó SUBCAMPEÓN DE LIGA en primera división CON LA REAL SOCIEDAD, mientras […]

title: Thursday Evening 6ish Mile Run – (Reverse) K Bridge
description: This is the Reverse K-Bridge Thursday Night Run. 7:00 PM meetup at Lou Lodati Park. We will wait up to 5 minutes to allow for late arrivals. Please be prompt! We sometimes go to a bar, restaurant, or coffee shop after our runs, so you may want to bring cash or a card. The route: […]
